nasb.text: Now Saul, still breathing threats and murder against the disciples of the Lord, went to the high priest,

esv.text: But Saul, still breathing threats and murder against the disciples of the Lord, went to the high priest

cnv.text: 掃羅仍向主的門徒發恐嚇兇殺的話。他到大祭司那裡，

ccb.text: 扫罗继续用凶狠的话恐吓主的门徒。他去见大祭司，

csbs.text: 扫罗仍然向主的门徒们口吐凶杀威吓的话。他来到大祭司面前，
